top_signals.title: APEC Is Important Part of Trade Agenda, US Diplomat Says
top_signals.summary: The US State Department’s point man for APEC says the group of 21 countries is an important customer for American goods and services - including energy. Bloomberg’s Chief North Asia Correspondent Stephen Engle spoke with Casey Mace, the US senior official to APEC, on the sidelines of the APEC trade ministers meeting in China.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
